targets.boundary: company-wide (entire value chain incl. supply chain and product life cycle)
targets.notes: Part of Apple’s 2030 plan; remaining emissions are intended to be addressed separately via carbon removal/offsetting to reach carbon neutrality.
targets.title: Reduce greenhouse gas emissions 75% by 2030 (Apple 2030)

targets.boundary: company-wide (entire value chain incl. supply chain and product life cycle)
targets.notes: Carbon neutrality goal for the full footprint by 2030, using deep emissions reductions and carbon removal for residual emissions.
targets.title: Carbon neutral across entire business, manufacturing supply chain and product life cycle by 2030 (Apple 2030)
